creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As gilbertd@cs.man.ac.uk wrote:

> Trying to install 2.1.6 via NFS, the mount failed the first time.
> If you go back to the menu and go through the novice install again
> it works fine.

I think this was a known problem, and his been fixed since -- but that
was already too late for 2.1.6. :(

IIRC, sysinstall wrote the resolv.conf into the true root /etc at the
first time, as opposed to the chroot'ed /etc.  Hence, if you specify
an FQDN, it will work, too.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
